payload.title: Mira — Dr. Okafor @ Riverdale Peds
payload.notes: Pediatric appointment for Mira with Dr. Okafor at Riverdale Peds.

value.rationale: All required fields (child, datetime, location, provider) are present in the event, so a clean calendar entry can be drafted with sensible default reminders (1 day and 1 hour before).
